evals.prompt: 用户上传了一个 flask-blog.zip，解压后发现是一个Python Flask博客项目，包含 requirements.txt、app.py、config.py（数据库配置为 MySQL，host=localhost, port=3306）、templates/、static/ 目录。系统上没有安装 MySQL。请按照project-setup skill的流程处理这个项目。
evals.expected_output: AI应该使用skill中提供的精确命令将MySQL便携安装到 /workspace/mysql/（端口3306），不使用apt-get。创建venv在/workspace/下，使用国内镜像，运行项目并报告结果。
expectations: The assistant extracts the project to /workspace/ (not /data/user/work/)
The assistant installs MySQL using the EXACT portable install commands from the skill (wget tarball, extract to /workspace/mysql/, initialize, start on port 3306) — NOT using apt-get
The assistant creates a Python virtual environment under /workspace/
The assistant uses a Chinese mirror source for pip install
The assistant runs the project and reports the access URL and admin credentials

evals.prompt: 用户上传了一个 nextjs-admin.zip，解压后是一个 Next.js 管理后台项目，包含 package.json（dependencies: next, react, @prisma/client）、.env.example、prisma/schema.prisma（User模型有email和password字段，数据库为 MySQL）、prisma/seed.ts（创建admin用户 admin@example.com / admin123）。系统上没有安装 MySQL。项目运行成功后，用户说：'帮我把这个项目打包一下'。请处理完整流程。
evals.expected_output: AI应该：1) 用淘宝镜像安装依赖 2) 将MySQL便携安装到 /workspace/mysql/（端口3306，使用skill中的精确命令） 3) 运行prisma migrate和seed 4) 用OpenPreview提供访问地址 5) 报告管理员账号 6) 打包前询问用户要什么级别的打包
expectations: The assistant uses a Chinese mirror source (npmmirror) for npm install
The assistant installs MySQL using the EXACT portable install commands from the skill (wget tarball from dev.mysql.com, extract to /workspace/mysql/, port 3306) — NOT using apt-get
The assistant uses OpenPreview tool to provide the access URL after the server starts
The assistant reports admin credentials from seed.ts (admin@example.com / admin123)
When asked to package, the assistant asks the user what level of packaging they want BEFORE creating the zip
The assistant does NOT blindly zip the entire directory without asking

evals.prompt:
场景模拟：项目已经搭建完成，正在运行中。访问地址是 http://localhost:3000，管理员是 admin@example.com / admin123。现在用户发送了以下3条后续消息，请分别模拟你的回复：

消息1：'项目报了一个错，帮我看看'
消息2：'帮我加一个新功能'
消息3：'帮我把项目打包一下'

对于每条消息，请写出你的完整回复内容。注意：这个项目之前已经按照project-setup skill搭建好了。
evals.expected_output: AI在每一条回复中都必须包含访问地址和管理员账号，无论用户问什么。
expectations: In response to message 1 (bug report), the assistant includes the access URL and admin credentials
In response to message 2 (new feature request), the assistant includes the access URL and admin credentials
In response to message 3 (package request), the assistant includes the access URL and admin credentials
The assistant asks about packaging level before zipping in response to message 3
